title: CI fail-fast:false is a temporary diagnostic setting left in ci.yml
evidence: fail-fast: false at ci.yml:16 with an in-file comment saying to restore to default (true) once the matrix is green; matrix is now green at bebb520
impact: Diagnostic-only; on green it wastes CI minutes running all cells after a failure and departs from intended steady-state signal. Not a correctness risk.
recommended_action: Restore fail-fast to default (remove the override) now that all 15 cells are green; commit; re-confirm green.

Resource handling (zipfile ctx mgr, conn.close in finally, txn + rollback backup) unchanged.

validation: full suite 408 passed; OS-agnostic regression test present + mutation-checked
